params.value: SELECT OwnerId, Owner.Name, Amount, Name, CreatedDate, StageName, AccountId, Account.Name FROM Opportunity WHERE Winback_Pilot__c = 1 AND IsClosed = false AND Owner.GTM_Motion_User__c = 'Inside Sales' ORDER BY Owner.Name LIMIT 200
